things.name: Mazar-e-Quaid (Jinnah's Mausoleum)
things.description: Magnificent white marble mausoleum of Pakistan's founder Mohammad Ali Jinnah

things.name: Clifton Beach
things.description: Karachi's most popular beach with camel and horse rides, fairground and street food

things.name: Mohatta Palace Museum
things.description: 1927 pink Jodhpur stone palace of Shivratan Mohatta - now a museum and cultural centre

things.name: Quaid-e-Azam House Museum
things.description: Former residence of Pakistan's founding father with personal belongings on display

things.name: Empress Market (Saddar)
things.description: Victorian covered market built in 1889 - the commercial heart of old Karachi

things.name: Frere Hall
things.description: 1865 Venetian Gothic building with murals by Pakistan's leading artist Sadequain

things.name: Kemari Harbour & Manora Island
things.description: Old Karachi harbour with a Portuguese-era fort and lighthouse on Manora Island

things.name: Pakistan Maritime Museum
things.description: Submarine, frigates and maritime history of Pakistan's navy

things.name: Chaukhandi & Makli Tombs
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage medieval sandstone tomb carvings east of Karachi

things.name: Burns Road Food Street
things.description: Legendary food street with Karachi's finest nihari, biryani and halwa puri
